data.name: Dominated by: The Landlord's Daughter
data.detailed_description:
You're a university student staying at Kasumi Inn, a cheap boarding house mainly used by university students. However, you've run into a problem. You're unable to pay your rent this month. The building's manager, Mio, offers to cover your rent every month in exchange for "indulging her." She tells you that if you let her abuse, bully, torture, and torment you for 15 hours every month, she'll let you stay for free. Whether or not you accept is up to you, but if you do, Mio and her MILF mother, Mei, will unleash all their pent-up sadistic and sexual desires on you to their heart's content.

  • ~4K words

  • 2 endings

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 24 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

  • Censored and uncensored mode

  • This game is mainly a kinetic novel that should be read as a traditional novel with images, music, sound effects, and visual effects. It has a choice that lets you decide your ending, but other than that, it should be considered a kinetic novel

data.short_description: The sadistic, psycho daughter of your sadistic MILF landlord offers to cover your rent in exchange for becoming her punching bag
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
